sorry_locations.notes: All 12 sorry need Mathlib. WrapAngle: floor arithmetic. Atmosphere: mono/anti-mono. SqrtLinear: Real.sqrt branch. All other 22 files sorry-free.

bugs_found.description: NaN safety violation in signNoZero<float> — returns 0 for NaN, violating ne_zero contract
negate<int16_t> involution error — INT16_MAX special case incorrect, negate(negate(-32767))=-32768
LATENT BUG (confirmed by FV + correspondence tests): wrap_bin(bin, n) returns negative for bin <= -n-1; C++ truncation mod; callers use result as array index => UB

wrap_bin_cpp Python model uses abs/sign decomposition to emulate C++ truncation-toward-zero
Bug region: bin + bin_count < 0 iff bin < -bin_count; wrapBinCpp(-bin_count-1, bin_count) = -1

noncomputable axiom needed for Rat -> Rat axioms that have no implementation body (sqrtBranch)
